allow: Bash(node -e "const b = require\('/tmp/meridian-briefing.json'\); console.log\('headline:', b.headline\); console.log\('products:', b.products.map\(p => p.name + ' \(fit ' + p.fit + '\)'\).join\(' | '\)\); console.log\('facts:', b.facts.map\(f => f.label + '=' + f.value\).join\(' | '\)\); console.log\('sourcesCount:', b.sourcesCount\); console.log\('has quality.duration:', b.quality && b.quality.duration\);")
